---
title: 'Don, Roy Jr, Lawrence, & John Wolfe (Brothers)'
date: '2004-02-12T09:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '46119103034192662'
blogger_filename: '/2004/01/don-roy-jr-lawrence-john-wolfe-brothers.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-1-569775f7d093.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1227" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-1-5f721f7a85c6.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-2-2917fc6c277e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1232" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-2-ecb5c7f392e2.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-3-b9b038e97563.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1234" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-3-fa1706db4d69.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
